safe_chapter3_claim: The CFD database is a reference simulation database used for methodology diagnostics and model-form evidence
required_source: CFD legal-use matrix and extraction methodology packet
forbidden_claim: The CFD database is an experimental validation data set
reason: CFD outputs are solved-field evidence and external/holdout rows have protected use rules

safe_chapter3_claim: The Salt1-4 postProcessing inventory currently contains 23 registered parsed sources 1405596 tidy rows and 16353 window-stat rows
forbidden_claim: All parsed rows are admitted for runtime prediction
reason: Inventory coverage is not the same as source/property or model admission

safe_chapter3_claim: Retained-window statistics report stability/drift of observed CFD function-object quantities
forbidden_claim: Retained-window means may be inserted into runtime models as mdot wallHeatFlux cooler duty or temperatures
reason: Observed QoIs are diagnostic unless a later legal release permits use

safe_chapter3_claim: Velocity-profile parsing used latest-profile mode and retained total coverage metadata
forbidden_claim: Latest-profile mode proves full time-history profile UQ
reason: Full profile-history parsing would require a separate heavy row

safe_chapter3_claim: S13 pressure and Q_wall examples are exact target-window diagnostic reductions on fixed seeded domains
forbidden_claim: Exact target-window pressure or Q_wall values are admitted component-loss or heat-loss closures
reason: Same-QOI neighbor/mesh UQ and admission gates remain separate

safe_chapter3_claim: Heat-path ownership separates internal Nu wall conduction insulation/quartz external convection radiation jacket/cooler storage source and residual lanes
required_source: Thermal accounting traceability and extraction methodology packets
forbidden_claim: Missing heat residual is absorbed into internal Nu
reason: Internal Nu is one lane and cannot silently own residual heat loss

safe_chapter3_claim: Final-training rows can be used for training only after candidate-specific legal and source/property gates
forbidden_claim: Nominal Salt1-4 rows automatically validate or freeze a predictive model
reason: Training permission is conditional and current source/property release remains blocked

safe_chapter3_claim: Holdout and external-test rows are score-only after an independently frozen candidate
forbidden_claim: Holdout or external rows may guide fit tuning model selection or current score
reason: Protected rows must remain blind until freeze

safe_chapter3_claim: Negative and blocked results are legitimate thesis evidence for model-form limits
forbidden_claim: Failed diagnostic paths can be renamed as predictive closures
reason: Blocked evidence should prevent overclaiming rather than admit a coefficient
